changelog: Added WordPress-style background tasks (pseudo-cron) - email ingestion, recurring tasks and maintenance run automatically without server cron
Added Remember me checkbox on login - stay logged in after browser restart (30-day secure cookie)
URLs in tickets and comments are now automatically converted to clickable links
Fixed report localization - dates and month names now show in the correct language
Fixed encoding issue in report footer (corrupted characters)
Added missing translations for report fields (Total Amount, Hours Worked)
Dashboard time display is now smaller and less prominent
Fixed comment edit losing rich-text formatting from Quill editor
Fixed public share page not displaying rich-text formatting
